original_image_tags: A series of five hand-drawn sketches labeled 1 through 5, showing a crescent moon and a small black dot (the object). The moon's orientation is marked with S (South) at the top and N (North) at the bottom. The object's position relative to the moon changes in each sketch. In sketch 3, a horizontal line is drawn across the moon's width with the text "1081 MILES". The sketches are arranged horizontally across the page.

elements.description: A series of five identical hand-drawn diagrams arranged horizontally, labeled 1 through 5. Each diagram depicts a semicircle representing the moon with the top labeled 'S' and the bottom labeled 'N'. A small black dot representing an object is shown in different positions relative to the moon in each frame: 1) to the left of the moon, 2) approaching the left edge, 3) overlapping the left edge with a label '1081 MILES' pointing to the object, 4) overlapping the bottom edge, and 5) directly below the moon. The sequence illustrates the object's movement at four-minute intervals.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on five sketches, their horizontal arrangement, the moon/orientation labels, the object's relative movement, and the quoted '1081 MILES' text in sketch 3, but Description B adds unverified details about specific positions and a claim about four-minute intervals not present in Description A.
